title: Hey! Your Crops Are Ready (HYCAR)
description: Adds an exclamation mark above fully grown crops.
body:
# HEY! Your Crops Are Ready

**Stop guessing and never miss a harvest again!**

Tired of constantly checking on your farms, waiting for that final growth stage? This resource pack takes the guesswork out of farming and mining by adding clear, animated visual markers above fully grown plants and crystals. When you see the sign, you know it's time to collect!

### ✨ Features

*   ❗ **Bouncing Exclamation Marks:** Instantly spot ripe crops ready for picking.
*   🌸 **Blooming Flowers:** Beautiful blossoms appear above mature, harvestable kelp.
*   ✨ **Sparkling Indicators:** Eye-catching glimmers and markers highlight ready-to-mine amethyst clusters.

### 🚀 Version 7: The 2026 Compatibility Update

Now fully updated for **Minecraft 26.1.2**! To ensure a seamless, warning-free experience no matter what version you play on, the pack has been split into dedicated downloads spanning every major era from 1.13 to the present:

*   **26.1.x Edition:** Built specifically for the latest Minecraft 26+ updates.
*   **Legacy Editions (1.13 through 1.21.x):** Classic, stable versions tailored perfectly for older installations. We’ve gone back through the archives to give every single legacy file a version update, standardized names, and fresh logos for ultimate consistency!

_(Note: Our massive **Crystal Expansion**—extending visual markers to amethyst and geode blocks from your favorite mods—is included in all editions from 1.17 onward!)_

### 🧩 Mod Compatibility

_HEY! Your Crops Are Ready_ goes way beyond Vanilla. Enjoy seamless, out-of-the-box integration with a massive list of popular agricultural and magical mods, including:

*   [Bewitchment](https://modrinth.com/mod/bewitchment)
*   [Croptopia](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/croptopia-fabric)
*   [[Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight)
*   [Immersive Engineering](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersiveengineering)
*   [More Geodes](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-geodes)
*   [Mystical Agriculture](https://modrinth.com/mod/mystical-agriculture)
*   [Oh the Biomes You'll Go](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomesyougo)
*   [Pam's Harvestcraft 2 - Crops](https://modrinth.com/mod/pams-harvestcraft-2-crops)
*   [Promenade](https://modrinth.com/mod/promenade)
*   [Silent Gear](https://modrinth.com/mod/silent-gear)
*   [Spectrum](https://modrinth.com/mod/spectrum)
*   [Thermal Cultivation](https://modrinth.com/mod/thermal-cultivation)

### 🏆 Credits

This resource pack is proudly built upon the excellent foundation of **Vanilla Tweaks**. Full credit for the original concept, textures, and code goes to their incredibly talented team. Please check them out and support their work at [VanillaTweaks.net](https://vanillatweaks.net/)!
